text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa and I are on our way back from a
day out, when...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Trainer... Do you remember Ellie Condra?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Her farewell match is coming up soon. If it's okay
with you, I'd like to go together.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure she'll explain why she's giving up at the
match.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Thank you!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I gotta be ready to accept her reason, no matter
what!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the match, which turns out to be
just as exciting as the previous one. It ends with
Ellie Condra as the victor.

text_block_list.name: Ellie Condra
text_block_list.text:
Thank you, everyone, for coming today and for
supporting me all this time! I know this is very
sudden and comes as a surprise...

text_block_list.name: Ellie Condra
text_block_list.text: But, I...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: So she's going back home for her family.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
With her mother sick, it must be a super, super
difficult time for them...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: But still, Ellie Condra...

text_block_list.name: Ellie Condra
text_block_list.text:
This is how I take responsibility! I can't keep
everyone just waiting for me!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Ellie Condra...

text_block_list.name: Ellie Condra
text_block_list.text:
I really didn't plan on explaining why I'm leaving. I
was worried it would hurt my mother.

text_block_list.name: Ellie Condra
text_block_list.text: But this way, I can let everyone know something.

text_block_list.name: Ellie Condra
text_block_list.text:
Everyone who supported me, as well as a certain
girl who challenged me to prove my strength...

text_block_list.name: Ellie Condra
text_block_list.text:
Know that while I may be retiring, I'm not giving
up on becoming world champion! I'll prove it
someday, somehow!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
She had the same eyes as me when she said that!
Brave, like the king of the sky hunting down prey!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: How could I think that she gave up on her dream?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I've been watching her since she made her debut.
I can't believe I doubted her for even a second.
choice_data_list: Maybe because you relate to her?
It's because you're a big fan.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah, you might be right.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I felt like if she quit, maybe I would quit someday
too. And that got me scared...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I thought I'd kissed the weak El goodbye already.
But... I guess not.
choice_data_list: You can always do it again!
You can always do it again!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Hehe, that's right!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
You know what? I'm really glad I came to her
farewell match today!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Now I can say farewell to the chicken inside of me
too!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
...Ellie Condra! I'll be first to prove that I'm the
strongest in the world!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
And when you come back someday, you're gonna
regret letting me win!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa raises both arms with new
determination to pursue her dreams.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
It's true that I was really shocked. I couldn't think
of anything else...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I'm always so calm, but I got real heated this time!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
If my parents got sick, I don't think I'd know what
to do.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I think I would want to go back home.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
But... you can't give up on your dreams. You have
to keep chasing them no matter what!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: That's what my papa would say. Plus...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I have a trainer here who believes in me!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I'll definitely prove I'm the strongest in the world
someday!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Okay!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa raises both arms with new
determination to pursue her dreams.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Aha... I'm a fan!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: That's why I've been so obsessed with her!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I wonder if I'll have fans who are obsessed with
me someday too.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Hehehe... That's right!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
In that case, I promise I won't make you worry
again!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I'm the world's strongest, and I'll never give up on
my dreams!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa raises both arms with new
determination to pursue her dreams.
